faq.title: ZhongLens FAQ
faq.description: Quick answers about scanning, hovering, and getting the most out of ZhongLens.

items.question: How do I scan the page I’m looking at?
items.answer:
Use the shortcut to quickly scan the page (default: CTRL+O to open, CTRL+L to close).
You can customize this shortcut in the settings. Alternatively, open the ZhongLens popup and click Capture Tab.
ZhongLens will analyze the current tab so you can hover over detected Chinese text.

items.question: How do I see translations or lookup information?
items.answer:
Make sure to install a pop-up dictionary such as Zhongwen in your browser before using ZhongLens.
After a scan finishes, move your cursor over highlighted text on the page.

items.question: How do I get the best results possible?
items.answer: To get the best results possible, use Cloud OCR for more accurate processing and Crop mode to reduce the time it takes to scan the page.

items.question: What does Crop mode do?
items.answer:
Crop mode lets you select a smaller region before running OCR. By cropping, the OCR model has to scan less pixels, which makes it significantly faster.
That's why it is always recommended to use Crop mode.

items.question: What’s the difference between Local and Cloud OCR?
items.answer:
Local OCR uses a smaller model (Tesseract.js), so it runs directly on your device. It’s fast and lightweight, but less accurate.
Cloud OCR uses a larger model (PaddleOCR), which is significantly more accurate.
However, it’s too resource-intensive to run in a browser, so it runs on a server instead.
Since running this model incurs ongoing costs, unlimited Cloud OCR is only available to supporters.

items.question: Do I need an account to use ZhongLens?
items.answer: You do not need an account to use ZhongLens. However, a free account is required to use Cloud OCR in order to enforce usage limits.

items.question: Do you store any screenshot data?
items.answer: Privacy is of utmost importance to us. We don't store any of your screenshot/OCR data.

items.question: I found a bug. How do I report it?
items.answer: Please send me an email at dev@zhonglens.dev. I will do my best to fix all bugs immediately.

steps.title: Welcome to ZhongLens
steps.description: ZhongLens lets you look up Chinese characters in any content. Here’s how to get the most out of it. It’ll take less than a minute. Listen up!

steps.title: Step 1: Install a pop-up dictionary
steps.description: If you haven't already, install a pop-up dictionary like Zhongwen from the Chrome web store. ZhongLens is compatible with any pop-up dictionary.

steps.title: Step 2: Look up Chinese characters
steps.description:
When you're watching any kind of content, press the key combination (by default: CTRL + O) to bring up the OCR overlay.
The characters will automatically be overlayed on the screen, and you can then hover over them to bring up the pop-up dictionary.
Close the overlay with the key combination to keep watching (by default: CTRL + L).

steps.title: Get better results: Cropping
steps.description:
The larger the scanned area is, the slower and noisier OCR gets.
Crop to your subtitle area for the best results (Ctrl + U to open, Ctrl + I to close).
You may need to re-crop if subtitles move or you switch into fullscreen.

steps.title: Get better results: Cloud OCR
steps.description:
ZhongLens offers two modes: Local and Cloud OCR.
Local runs in your browser. It’s fast, but less accurate.
Cloud runs on a private server. It’s slightly slower, but much more accurate.
Become a ZhongLens supporter to unlock unlimited Cloud OCR.
Your screenshots are never stored.

steps.title: Customize ZhongLens
steps.description:
To change your settings, just open the extensions panel click on the ZhongLens logo.
On this page, you can crop, switch OCR modes, toggle shortcuts, and become a supporter.

steps.title: You're ready!
steps.description: You can now use ZhongLens! If you have any more questions, please refer to the FAQ or send me an email at dev@zhonglens.dev.

monthly.desc: Unlock unlimited cloud usage and extra customization and support ongoing development.

lifetime.desc: One-time support. Keep premium access and help sustain ZhongLens long-term.
